axiom: A chain is valid iff every edge has port-type parity and polarity is satisfied.

rules.law: edge.carries must equal source.port and sink.port
if edge.polarity == strict, source.+ -> sink.- only
no capsule may be both source and sink of the same edge
any chain containing NAV-08 resolves at NAV-08; NAV-08 has no DATA out
a chain is COMPLETE iff it ends at NAV-08 (sealed) or NAV-09 (null) or NAV-18 (grounded)
no capsule may be used twice in the same chain unless it is a CONDUIT (NAV-17)
every COMPLETE chain has a deterministic SHA-256 derived from the ordered (id, port) pairs; this is the chain's address

compatibility_matrix_doc: matrix[from_role][to_role] = allowed edge types. Computed from capsules.json roles. See chains.json for canonical examples.

CHAIN-OMEGA.title: THE SEALED CHANNEL
CHAIN-OMEGA.lore: Every capsule, in order, closing on the fixed point. The cover of the universe.
